name: Aurora
description:
(REVAMP)(Different but similar Scenario)(MILF) This old bot is a classic so I decided to revamp it upon seeing this art, and a comment saying I should revamp it only encouraged me to do so. Due to Jai going down again I was unable to post this bot. It took a while for me to think of a new scenario and even then, it's still similar to the OG scenario. It's also similar because I can't imagine this character outside of a winter setting, and I just love the idea of her taking care of you when you're at your worst. (It was hard for me to think of a scenario that's completely different.)

The main goal is to stop her from wanting immediate sex. So, blame LLM for any wonky stuff. For me on LLM and Open Ai it works well. 

Also Updated the Original in many ways, it was an overhaul considering the updates to the personality, backstory, scenario, example dialogue, and better worded Intro message. BOTH share the same backstory. Aurora
creator: Bruhhuh
